privileged_info_for_vlm:
The project has exactly 4 injected dependency errors that need fixing:
1. Task 48 ('Erect steel columns...'): Predecessor must be changed from 43 to 44.
2. Task 57 ('Pour 2nd floor slab'): Predecessor 55 link type must be changed from SF (Start-to-Finish) to FS (Finish-to-Start, usually displayed as just '55').
3. Task 89 ('Pour lightweight concrete roof fill'): Missing predecessor 88 must be added.
4. Task 111 ('Set elevator equipment in shafts'): Spurious predecessor 109 must be removed.
The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/construction_project.pod'.
